goal: GAD TUI workers liveness panel + subprocess watchdog. (1) packages/gad-tui add /workers route that tails log.jsonl per worker, computes liveness from mtime, displays badges [WRITING] [SILENT >Ns] [WORKING] [IDLE] [DEAD]. Operator never needs to arm bash Monitor by hand. (2) lib/team/subprocess.cjs::runSubprocess add stderr-mtime watchdog — if no subproc activity >300s and no child.exit, force-kill + logWrite work-failed reason=watchdog-timeout. Resolves silence-as-failure class (entries codex-worker-no-completion-marker, monitor-silence-not-failure, codex-hooks-hang-detached-worker).
